calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, Instructing Trustees And For Appointment Of Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order For Distribution Of Automobile
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order For Partial Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Weiss (Counsel for Michael Kent, Trustee).

After brief discussion with Mr. Weiss concerning his efforts to locate the missing beneficiary (Rafael Kent) and the manner of distribution to the grandchildren, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Omar de Leon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Pamela Meyers.

Post Script: Subsequent to the hearing, the Court granted the Petition, signing the Order for same on June 6, 2007. RMD
